Subject: Request to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to formally request the unblocking of my account, which was recently suspended due to suspicious payment activities. I did not make any payments that triggered the block, and I am committed to complying with Google’s policies.  

I understand the importance of maintaining secure and trustworthy account practices, and I am cooperating with any additional verification required. Please review the following information:  

- Account details: [Generic placeholder]  
- Payment history: [Generic placeholder]  
- Verification steps: [Generic placeholder]  

I appreciate your attention to this matter and look forward to a prompt resolution.  

Sincerely,  
[Generic placeholder]
